title: Mojang Flight Simulator
description: "For those that don't want to buy Microsoft Flight Simulator." (it is basically improved elytra and some performance mods)
body:
This is a modpack that adds very **"tiny"** tweaks to the elytra, and also adds an elytra hud just like _Microsoft Flight Simulator_.

![A cover image with many different "versions" of elytras definitely not taking inspiration from Microsoft flight simulator at all.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2bcee69cc71e2d7107d04e1a1d4ae7ab78ea7bb1.jpeg)

- **"Do a barrel roll"**
- Elytra enchantments
- **Flight U.I.**
- Tweaks to the clouds and atmosphere
- **"Easy elytra takeoff"**
- Elytra bombing
- **Elytra pitch**
- Elytra slot
- **Elytra Time**
- Head in the Clouds
- **Tectonic (world generation alter)**
- Iris Shaders
- **Elytra Trims**
- Stutter fixes
- **Many more...**
